text: Collect user and public-interest evidence for the Prototype Fund application
description: Interview at least five open-source maintainers, agent-tool developers, or small technical teams. Test the problem statement: intent and dependencies drift away from code; agent work is difficult to inspect; issue trackers capture tasks but not value/rationale. Capture concrete quotes only with permission, current workflows, failed alternatives, desired integrations, and willingness to test the prototype. Seek 2-3 lightweight letters or written commitments to pilot.

status.comment: Requires Felix outreach and interviews; the agent can prepare scripts and synthesize notes.
